title: parasenecio albus
intro: Parasenecio albus is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Parasenecio albus is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture through herbal preparations, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
